column1: C[Alphyn: Hi there! To tell the truth, I have unintentionally started this game and I haven't played in years. But ok, I'll play, if you don't mind
C[Quaswhat: Please do. I have only been playing a few months so I make plenty of mistakes!
C[Alphyn: That was a great save. I should have seen it earlier.
Quaswhat: Thanks. To tell you the truth, I didn't see it til a few moves back. I love this game, It reveals itself in unexpected ways.
C[Quaswhat: Well done! I don't think I can come back from this. Just happy to have saved that group. Again?
C[Alphyn: Sure, thanks for the good game.
C[Alphyn: Hi! Have a nice game!
C[Alphyn: Hi, have a nice game!
C[Alphyn: Thanks for an interesting game!
C[Alphyn: Hi there! Have a nice game!
C[Alphyn: Hi there! Have a nice game!
C[Astelia: Hello! Good game to you too.
C[Alphyn: Hi there! To tell the truth, I have unintentionally started this game and I haven't played in years. But ok, I'll play, if you don't mind 😀
C[AxTx: Ha! That's ok, I unintentionally started a number of games too
AxTx: I've only been playing a few weeks
C[Alphyn: Ok, I hope it will be fun, even though I have a very vague Idea of what I'm doing
C[AxTx: We can figure it out together :)
C[Alphyn: I'm off to bed, so see ya in about 8 hours!
C[Alphyn: Thanks for the great game! It was really close and fun. Even if it is a very slow type of fun. :)
C[matburt: Welcome to Nova!  What do you think of the site so far?
C[Alphyn: Hi, sorry for the slow moves, I keep forgetting about the game.
Alphyn: The site looks great. It's simple and it works.  And it works on my tablet.
Alphyn: I wish more players knew about it.
Alphyn: Are you a member of the dev team?
C[matburt: I am... it's me and another guy (anoek).  We're trying to spread the word so if you know of any place that might help us get the word out then let me know :)
C[Alphyn: You did a great job than. I saw a link to this site in the largest Russian Go community in a social network.  But most russian players prefer KGS  afaik.

Alphyn: By the way, There is a bug with the chat window. If the message is longer than the text field and you scrolled the page down, and if you bress backspace,  the text field is replaced vith the nav bar!
Alphyn: If you go on typing, the text field comes back, but that's strange and annoying.
Alphyn: My browser is Chrome 24.0.1312.57 m and resolution is 1280*1024.
C[matburt: oh wow, that's weird... thanks for that!

matburt: I realize most people do like KGS, but we're striving to be the best possible system.  How do you like it so far?  What is the consensus from the large Russian go community that you've seen so far?

C[Alphyn: Well, I don't know about the Russian community, it's the largest, but not large compared to other countries. As for me, I never could make myself play on KGS, but this site has something about it.

Alphyn: BTW, another bug, if you open the bug report window and type something in it and then use the arrow keys to edit the text, the keys will also switch the moves in the game back and forth. It looks like the game should lose focus when the bug report window is open, but it doesn't.
matburt: ahh indeed, it does seem like it steals the focus... thanks again :)
C[matburt: Just pushed up a new version of the site!
matburt: though it doesn't include some of these fixes... we're still looking to fix them
C[Alphyn: Good to see that you are working on the site making it even better )
C[Alphyn: And yet another one for you ) I didn't check the PC, but on my tablet the tooltip explaining the game preferences button won't disappear and it covers the chat window
matburt: and we'll continue to... we've got some great features coming up
matburt: if you click game preferences it doesn't go away?
Alphyn:  well, I tried clicking everywhere but it doesn't seem to go away
C[matburt: what kind of tablet do you have?
C[matburt: we've disabled it, so if you reload your page it should be gone
C[Alphyn: it's nexus 7 and the browser is chrome
C[matburt: alrighty, I've gotta head to bed now.  I'll catch up on the game tomorrow
Alphyn: ok, good night, pleasure playing with you
C[matburt: wait to use those conditional moves
C[Alphyn: Analyze game and plan conditional moves are great features.
Alphyn: When looking at the games on the main page, I think there should be an easier way to tell which player plays which colour.
Alphyn: Sure you can check the colour of the latest placed stone and then look whose move is it, but it is a little too much of mind excercise ))
Alphyn: Maybe using small icons could work
Alphyn: Oh I suddenly got it )))
Alphyn: The guy whose name goes first plays the black )
matburt: I actually mean to say ""Way to use those conditional moves"" instead of ""wait..."" :)
matburt: Yeah, that's a very good point... thanks for the suggestion!
C[Alphyn: Well, I realised it wasn't necessary
Alphyn: Since the black is always to the left
C[matburt: I think this one may be hopeless for me so I'm going to pass
C[Alphyn: Привет, Егор, меня зовут Игорь ) Приятно познакомиться
C[Alphyn: Привет, Егор, меня зовут Игорь ) Приятно познакомиться
C[Alphyn: Егор, прежде всего старайся захватить углы, там проще всего построить территорию.
Alphyn: На рутреккере есть сборники книг по го, полезно почитать, чтобы понять основные принципы.
C[egor.orlov.1988: Спасибо. Я основные принципы знаю. Сейчас пытаюсь понять как это все в реальности работает)
C[Alphyn: Хах, рановато мне тебя учить )
C[Alphyn: Ты знаешь про принцип двух глаз?
egor.orlov.1988: да. знаю. но пока не всегда понимаю какие ложные а какие нет.
Alphyn: ясно, просто если видишь, что у группы невозможно уже 2 глаза сделать, например, как у верхней твоей, то не трать ходы на ее спасение
C[egor.orlov.1988: нужно еще во многом разобраться)
C[matburt: I'll probably still be a little slow to play... doing a little work too :)
C[matburt: I'll probably still be a little slow to play... doing a little work too :)
C[Alphyn: Sory, sometimes i forget to submit a move ))
C[Alphyn: Hmm, maybe a stone shoulb be transpatent until it's submited.
matburt: maybe have some other indicator that it's not quite submitted yet?
C[Alphyn: Yes, that would be good to have
C[Alphyn: Hmm, I've noticed, tat white stones have a tiny black pixel on them
Alphyn: as well as the black stones, which have white pixels
Alphyn: If it's done to give the stones a bit of 3d-feel, I'd suggest smoothing those pixels a bit
Alphyn: Otherwise those pixels catch the eye
C[Alphyn: why did you miss that atari?
Alphyn: is that some kind of evil sorcery? :-)
C[anoek: well, keep in mind i'm not very good yet.. but the thought is to keep you from being able to build a secure wall on the left like this or something
C[Alphyn: anoek, I saw Nikita (he is my friend irl) report an issue with the chat
Alphyn: check the chat in my first game vs matburt

anoek: I'm fixing the arrow keys in bug reporting issue right now, and I'm going to try to fix the disappearing input thing as I implement autosizing this chat window .. they should be fixed soon I think :)
C[Alphyn: You are doing a great job )
C[Alphyn: Hah, I should have taken the handicap )
Alphyn: not sure if it would save me though )
C[anoek: Hehe, luck this time I think - I usually have a hard time finding those ways to rescue my stones like those in l3

anoek: By the way, the disappearing input bug should be fixed in the next patch, also the left/right arrow key bug in the bug reporting box should also be fixed... we should be releasing those in the next 24-48 hours
Alphyn: We definnitely need to work out a reliable rating asap
Alphyn: I feel that I play better than Matt, who is 27k
Alphyn: and i can do at least something against Kaith
Alphyn: But I'm helpless against you)
C[anoek: Well, i was set to 25k, but then a few people came along as 30k as whomped me :) I reset myself to 25k.. i don't actually know how strong I am yet..

anoek: The ratings will start to stabilize eventually, but it'll probably take a little while, especially as 30k'ers come in and accept my ranked challenges without updating their own ranking to something reasonable :)
Alphyn: I had so many rendering issues on my tablet and now they are all gone.
Alphyn: There is a problem with the ingame chat however
Alphyn: if I zoom out the page I cannot see what I am typing, as the onscreen keyboard covers the lower part of the chat
Alphyn: It seems to be a big of android, I restarted the browser, it's gone now
anoek: Phew :) bugs the resolve themselves are my favorite kind :)
anoek: and glad you like the update! it should only get better from here, hopefully :)
C[Alphyn: Anoek, please ban be from this site for making unbelievely stupid moves )
C[anoek: Haha, I'd have to ban myself then too :)
C[Alphyn: Привет, Кит! Я, правда, спать как раз шел, но ты не забывай про игру, доиграем )
ivashkov.nikita: Олрайт -) Это клево, что без таймера, сам не планировал сейчас заседать -)
ivashkov.nikita: я то еще не ложился в общем то -)
C[Alphyn: ну зачем же так организм мучить?
ivashkov.nikita: Я пытаюсь его мучить и спать ночью, но не очень получается )

C[ivashkov.nikita: i'm feeling that game would be nice one )
Alphyn: Я никогда о особо нигде не играл, чтобы можно было определить ранг
Alphyn: Так что буду постепенно подниматься, я не спешу )
Alphyn: тут надо сыграть 5 ранговых игр, чтобы твой ранг мог влиять на эло соперника
C[keith.river: я не знаю почему я еще не сплю )
C[Alphyn: Кит, привет! Врезапно, вы не заняты с Сен сегодня вечером? )
C[Alphyn: Да блин, что же мне всюду одного хода не хватает? )
Alphyn: Ты зря это написал ) А то я бы по своему нубству думал бы, что это какой-то хитрозадый китайский ход
Alphyn: А теперь жди, пока я осознаю, в чем твоя ошибка )
C[keith.river: ну теперь посмотрим куда меня выведет этот один ход которого всегда так не хватает  -)
keith.river: а с другой стороны не так все и страшно ^_^
keith.river: да я только что это понял -)
keith.river: но кажется ты только что умер (=
C[Alphyn: Ну, значит, будет, на каких ошибках учиться )
keith.river: на самом деле вот смотрю я на наши ошибки и думаю на сколько же это на другом уровне мышления по сравнению с тем вальсом пятых данов
C[Alphyn: Я тоже часто об этом задумываюсь
Alphyn: Играю, например сейчас с парнем, который во второй раз в жизни играет, похоже
Alphyn: и с высоды 30 кю сразу все видно
Alphyn: я вроде выигрывал, но все равно интересно было бы доиграть
keith.river: у меня тоже вчера чуть таймер не закончился )
Alphyn: Будем считать, что в этом матче я научился считать даме у групп )
keith.river: даа, мне его малость не хватает -)
C[Alphyn: Эх, ну вот я и компенсировал
Alphyn: если б в E8 походил, интереснее было бы
C[Alphyn: А почему мы без коми играем, кстати?
keith.river: а вот не знаю ) ты наверное вырубил когда матч создавал )
Alphyn: Ну посмотрим, спасет ли это меня
keith.river: ох лол ) думал что походил пять минут назад )
C[keith.river: ладно, завтра посмотрим спасет ли что нибудь меня
Alphyn: Ох, терпеть не могу такие ситуации, когда надо переключаться с тактического режима в стратегический )
C[Alphyn:  Привет, Марк, я, правда, спать шел
Alphyn: Но ты не забывай про игру, сыграем
C[quark: Hi Alphyn. Have a good game.
C[Alphyn: Hi, yes, same to you)
C[quark: Good place to stop for me. Gotta get some work done...
Alphyn: ok, good luck with your work, I'll get some sleep )
C[quark: Thanks Alphyn. I'm going to break off for now.
C[quark: I made a really bad move with D13
Alphyn: And I replied with equally bad H11
quark: I'm not sure what my strength is. Haven't played in a long time.
quark: Yeah, I was sure I was going to lose that upper left group.
C[quark: Losing the middle group was inevitable after that.
C[Alphyn: How do I stop sacrifising stones for nothing like that?
Alphyn: Maybe I should join an Anoymous group or something.
quark: Always look where you can make eyes and deny the same for your opponent
quark: You're playing better than a 28kyu from what I remember
Alphyn: Trying to perform the second part usually results in a punishment )
C[quark: Yes, I just experienced that :)
C[Alphyn: Anyways I enjoy the game, and I hope you do too ) Hopefully I'll learn something from it )
quark: This is my first game since in years, so I'm enjoying it very much.
Alphyn: And for me it's the 3rd or 4th 19x19 game I've ever played )
quark: Wow! You're doing extremely well...
C[Alphyn: Thanks, I played hikaru no go on a gameboy vs an AI, but you can mainly play 9x9 and 13x13 there, It taught me some tactics at least, but it was long ago
Alphyn: I also read a book about Go written by some top Russian players )
C[Alphyn: But it contained passages like ""This move is the best here, because it's filled with harmony and ballance"". )
C[quark: Oh yeah, ""harmony and balance"" That helps...
C[quark: I was kidding of course.
C[Alphyn: I had a feeling that they tell me what is right, but don't explain why
Alphyn: Maybe I'm too harsh on them, maybe I just lack the game experience to understand
quark: ""Harmony and balance"" is too vague to be useful in my opinion
Alphyn: That's for sure, but it's not all like that ) I still think I should read it again latter, maybe I'll understand more
Alphyn: I don't know how that happend
C[Alphyn: why did you do that? could I really do something up there?
quark: Nah, we're coming to the end. we should just fill in those liberties
chinezul57: yep thx for the game
